title: Twist Cruncher Schnitzel
description: A twist on the classic German schnitzel, this dish features crunchy breadcrumbs and a tangy twist.
instructions: 2. Season the mozzabite slices with salt and pepper.
3. In a shallow dish, mix together the crunchy breadcrumbs and twist.
4. Dip each mozzabite slice into the breadcrumb mixture, coating both sides evenly.
5. Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and add a small amount of oil.
6. Fry the coated mozzabite slices for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
7. Transfer the fried schnitzel to a baking sheet and bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, until cooked through.
9. Garnish with additional twist, if desired.
